title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: LIFEBOAT SERVICES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of men's clothing, shoes, blankets (size double and under only), sleeping bands, and tents. 1040 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donations: By appointment only Office hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 741-3572 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 741-3572 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Please do not leave items at door without appointment. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEBOAT SERVICES
